title: FlowResult — structured result of a Flow execution
description: JSON Schema for the FlowResult dataclass (src/body/flows/result.py:49). The structured result contract every Flow execution returns. Constitutional requirement (CORE-Flow.md §6): FlowExecutor always returns a FlowResult — no exceptions. Fields mirror ActionResult where they overlap (ok, duration_sec, data) so callers can reason uniformly about both. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 1 (flow-boundary contract); CORE-Flow.md §6. This file uses the .schema.json suffix and is intentionally skipped by intent_validator.py.

flow_id.description: The registered flow_id that produced this result. Must match a declaration in .intent/flows/<id>.yaml via FlowRegistry.

ok.description: True if all required steps succeeded. False if any required step returned ok=False or raised. Optional steps never affect this field.

steps.description: Ordered list of StepResults, one per declared step in the Flow. May be empty for flows with zero steps (edge case).

duration_sec.description: Total wall-clock duration of the entire Flow execution in seconds.
